name: Roofing
title: AI Tools for Roofing Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for roofers — capture storm-season lead surges, draft estimates, and follow up on every inspection. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: When a hailstorm hits, the leads come in faster than you can answer the phone. The week after a storm decides your year. We build the tools that catch every one of them.
drains: A storm hits and 80 leads land in two days you can't all call back
Free-inspection requests that never get scheduled
Estimates and insurance-scope paperwork eating the owner's nights
Inspections done but no follow-up to turn them into signed jobs

tools.title: Storm-surge lead catcher
tools.body: When a storm drives a flood of calls and forms, the assistant answers every one, books inspections, and keeps prospects warm — so the surge becomes signed jobs instead of a missed-call list.

tools.title: Inspection follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every free inspection gets a structured follow-up: the findings, the quote, and a clear next step. Inspections stop ending in silence and start turning into contracts.

tools.title: Estimate & scope drafter
tools.body: It drafts estimates and helps assemble the insurance-scope paperwork from your notes and photos — turning hours of evening admin into a short review.

tools.title: Morning crew brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's installs and inspections, crew assignments, materials due, and yesterday's revenue.

cases.context: A residential roofing company after a regional hailstorm.
cases.before: A two-day lead surge overwhelmed the office; many callers never got a call back.
cases.after: Every storm lead answered and booked for an inspection within minutes, around the clock.
cases.impact: Representative result: a far higher share of storm-week leads converted into booked inspections.

cases.context: A roofer whose free inspections rarely got followed up.
cases.before: Inspections happened, then the lead went cold with no structured follow-up.
cases.after: Each inspection triggers an automatic, well-timed follow-up with the quote and next step.
cases.impact: Representative result: a meaningful lift in inspection-to-contract rate.

faq.q: Can it handle a sudden surge after a storm?
faq.a: Yes — that's the main reason roofers come to us. The lead catcher scales instantly. Whether 5 leads come in or 150, every one gets answered and booked in minutes.

faq.q: Does it help with insurance-scope paperwork?
faq.a: It drafts the estimate and assembles the scope documentation from your notes and photos. You review and finalize — the hours of evening paperwork become a short check.

faq.q: Will it work with my CRM?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of AccuLynx, JobNimbus, or whatever roofing CRM you already use.
